description_long: This is a single bed with a wooden frame and a simple, functional design, likely intended for institutional or utilitarian use. The bed features a visible mattress covered partially by a blue, wrinkled blanket and a matching pillow at one end. The frame is constructed from a medium-brown wood, with a solid base and two visible drawers on one side, suggesting built-in storage. Metal guardrails are present at the head and foot of the bed, providing additional safety or support. The bedding appears loosely arranged, with the blanket draped unevenly across the mattress. The overall appearance is practical and robust, suitable for environments such as dormitories, hostels, or urban shelters.
description: A wooden single bed with built-in storage drawers, metal guardrails, and blue bedding, designed for practical urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid wooden base and the blue blanket draped over the mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the two storage drawers and the extended wooden frame beneath the mattress.
description_view_2: End view showing the pillow and the full length of the blue blanket on the mattress.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the wooden frame, metal guardrails, and the arrangement of the bedding.
